sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ دِينَا فِي الطَّرِيقِ مَحْفَظَةً فِيهَا نُقُودٌ.
sentences.translation: Dina je na ulici pronašla novčanik s novcem u njemu.
sentences.translationEn: Dina found a wallet on the road with money inside.

sentences.arabic: فَكَّرَتْ كَثِيرًا مَاذَا تَفْعَلُ بِهَذِهِ الْمَحْفَظَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dugo je razmišljala šta da uradi s tim novčanikom.
sentences.translationEn: She thought a lot about what to do with this wallet.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أَنْ تَذْهَبَ إِلَى مَرْكَزِ الشُّرْطَةِ الْقَرِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučila je otići u obližnju policijsku stanicu.
sentences.translationEn: She decided to go to the nearby police station.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَهَا الضَّابِطُ وَقَالَ إِنَّ الأَمَانَةَ أَهَمُّ شَيْءٍ.
sentences.translation: Oficir joj se zahvalio i rekao da je poštenje najvažnija stvar.
sentences.translationEn: The officer thanked her and said honesty is the most important thing.
